children.name: hwRrppEnableStatus
children.description: Indicating whether the RRPP is enabled on this switch.

children.name: hwRrppLinkupDelayTime
children.description:
This value indicates the delay when ports change to Up. 
                     The value of this node ranges with products.
                     The default value is 0.

children.name: hwRrppPortTable
children.description:
A table containing information about configurations and
                status of a RRPP port.

children.name: hwRrppDomainTable
children.description:
A table containing information about configurations
                and status of a RRPP domain.

children.name: hwRrppRingTable
children.description:
A table containing information about configurations
                and status of a RRPP Ring.

children.name: hwRrppRingEntry
children.description: Detailed information of a specified RRPP Ring.

children.name: hwRrppSnoopingVsiTable
children.description: A table containing information about RRPP snooping relating interface.

children.name: hwRrppSnoopingInterfaceTable
children.description: A table containing information about RRPP snooping enable interface.
